info.title: Lawmadi OS Korean Legal AI
info.description: Korean legal consultation API with 60 specialized AI agents and real-time statute verification.

post.summary: Ask a Korean law question to a specialized AI legal agent
post.description: Submits a legal question. The system automatically routes it to the most relevant specialist among 60 legal domain agents. Returns verified legal analysis with statute citations checked against Korea's official legislative database.

query.description: The legal question. Can be in Korean or English. Korean queries get better results.

lang.description: Response language. Use 'en' for English responses.

response.description: The legal analysis with verified statute citations

leader.description: Name of the specialist agent that handled the query

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Free tier: 2 queries per day.
